name: Ansh Madaan
education: Thapar Institute of Engineering and Technology, B.E. Computer Science; Govt. Boys Senior Secondary School, Class XII

projects.name: Career Ops — AI-Powered Job Application Agent
projects.description: Developing an end-to-end FastAPI job-discovery platform aggregating listings from major job boards and ATS providers, narrowing 6,000+ listings to a shortlist using keyword filtering and TOPSIS-based ranking. It features an asynchronous backend, AI-driven resume tailoring, and a resume-parsing pipeline with Gemini and Pydantic.

projects.name: EEG-based Schizophrenia Detection using Deep Learning
projects.description: Designed a hybrid CNN–LSTM model with an attention mechanism, achieving 97% accuracy on an EEG dataset for schizophrenia detection. The project included multi-channel EEG signal preprocessing and model interpretation using Grad-CAM and Integrated Gradients.

projects.name: Face Recognition-Based Chatbot Authentication System
projects.description: Built a real-time face-recognition authentication system using OpenCV to secure a conversational AI interface, replacing password-based access. It integrated a facial-encoding pipeline and a TensorFlow NLP chatbot with custom intent classification and full voice I/O.

projects.name: Voice Assisted Terminal
projects.description: Developed a voice-controlled terminal capable of translating natural language commands to shell commands using Google Generative AI, supporting over 20 operation types. The project was published on PyPI for cross-platform installation.
